name: indology-l-archive-atlas-1990-2026
title: INDOLOGY-L Archive Atlas, 1990-2026
description: A reproducible metadata-first atlas of the public INDOLOGY-L Pipermail archive. The package contains harvested metadata, conservative author-normalization audit tables, topic and list-function summaries, directed reply and co-participation evidence, curation queues, sparse Renou state/register subject-line crosswalks, validation reports, and static atlas/search pages.

contributors.title: Generated by the INDOLOGY archive research pipeline

rights: Generated metadata and code-oriented documentation are prepared for reuse with attribution. Message metadata derives from a public mailing-list archive; quoted or linked archive content remains subject to the source archive and original posters. The atlas does not redistribute full message bodies in v1.
